title: Synthetic HTTP/2 resource exhaustion triage note
body: Review proxy, CDN, and application server telemetry for HTTP/2 stream reset patterns, flow-control pressure, CPU and memory saturation, and request concurrency. This note is advisory only and does not override the deterministic verdict.

provenance.source_question: What defensive evidence should be reviewed for this synthetic HTTP/2 event?
provenance.source_answer_summary: Review server resource metrics, proxy/CDN telemetry, stream reset patterns, and existing deterministic evidence gaps before making any conclusion.

advisory_boundary: Human-approved advisory knowledge only. This note is not a detection source, does not prove compromise, does not override deterministic Risk Level or Decision, and requires human review before operational use.
